title: KitchenCraft Ice Lolly Mould with 6 Reusable Umbrella Style Sticks, Plastic, Multi Colour
features: Why spend cash on sugary ice pops for your kids when you can make refreshingly fruity (and additive-free!) lollies with these moulds?
This BPA-free plastic lolly tray makes 6 colourful umbrella-shaped lollies, complete with cute plastic 'handles' for easy eating
So simple to use - just pour in fruit juice and freeze! Add chopped fruit for a vitamin boost, or freeze smoothies or yoghurt instead
Enjoy these umbrella lollies come rain or shine - the tray is 1% reusable and dishwasher safe!
description: From the manufacturer The definitive kitchenware brand KitchenCraft is the definitive kitchenware brand, with more than 1,300 everyday kitchen essentials to help you cook, bake and decorate. KitchenCraft Plastic Umbrella Ice Lolly Maker Kit The effort-free way to make healthy frozen treats for kids Sure, shop-bought lollies are sweet, delicious and children love them, but they're also packed with mysterious ‘E-numbers’ and unhealthy sugars. With KitchenCraft’s umbrella-shaped frozen lolly moulds, you can make healthier iced treats that your little ones can enjoy come rain or shine! Making a batch of frozen ice pops couldn't be easier with these ice lolly makers. Just pour fruit juice into each plastic mould and freeze. In just a few hours, you’ll have six cute, colourful ‘umbrellas’ to enjoy. Don’t stick to fruit juice, though. Pour in flavoured milk, yoghurt or even smoothies instead. There’s loads of room to be creative, with limitless flavour combos out there to discover. You could even freeze plain old water, for an unusual way to chill drinks and cocktails. These lolly makers make refreshing frozen treats kids love. And you get to rest safe in the knowledge that you know exactly what goes into them. No additives, no weird E-numbers, and the moulds are BPA-free. Each set includes 6 ice lolly makers in a plastic tray Makes lollies measuring approx. 11 cm (4½ inches) long and 4.5 cm (2 inches) wide Tray dimensions: 17 x 11 x 0.75 cm (6½ x 4½ x ½ inches) Individual mould capacity: 50 ml (2 fl oz) 100% BPA-free Dishwasher safe Why You'll Want This Popsicle Maker in Your Kitchen Make healthier ice pops When the sun’s out, there's no better treat for little ones than an ice pop to keep them cool. These ice lolly makers allow you to make healthier home-made versions with all natural ingredients. Slice up some fruit, add some juice, and you'll have a treat the kids are sure to treasure. Save yourself some cash Kids hear the jingle of the ice cream van, and instantly they want one. Keep that spare change in your own pocket, and make your own ice lollies instead. It’s especially good for kids’ parties, where you’ve got several sweltering children to keep happy. Because it comes with plastic umbrella ‘handles’, you don’t even have to fork out for cardboard sticks! Safe for use again and again This umbrella-shaped ice lolly kit is made from a combination of clear and colourful plastic. They're really durable, even with boisterous kids around. They're also dishwasher safe, which means the joy never stops! You can use them to make ice lollies over and over again. Ice Lolly Recipe Ideas Frozen yoghurt and berries Yoghurt works really well with this lolly tray, whether it's plain or fruity. Try stirring up a handful of blackberries into a bowl of yoghurt, then carefully pour into the moulds and freeze. Vanilla milk pops Remember milks pops from when you were little? They were delicious. Luckily, you can make them yourself in a flash. Simply pour a splash of vanilla extract into a mixture of milk and condensed milk for the perfect summer treat. Rainbow fruit lollies To give your lollies a real blast of colour, why not try blitzing kiwi fruit, melon and strawberries each separately with water? Then layer them up and pop them in the freezer for a bright treat that's sure to wow the little ones. About KitchenCraft The definitive kitchenware brand. Since 1850, KitchenCraft has designed, manufactured and supplied thousands of cooking utensils, tools and gadgets, each playing an important role in the kitchens of customers across the UK. With more than 1,000 products to choose from, there’s always a KitchenCraft product you can rely on - from essentials for every day to the exceptional.
